'''âdh-l-dh''' ('''kadhaladh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machete|machete]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machete|machete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-l-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kadhaladh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhaladh|thidhaladh]] || [[word:jidhaladh|jidhaladh]] || [[word:shidhaladh|shidhaladh]] || [[word:kidhaladh|kidhaladh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhaladh|thuthudhaladh]] || [[word:jujudhaladh|jujudhaladh]] || [[word:shushudhaladh|shushudhaladh]] || [[word:kukudhaladh|kukudhaladh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhaladh|thudhaladh]] || [[word:judhaladh|judhaladh]] || [[word:shudhaladh|shudhaladh]] || [[word:kudhaladh|kudhaladh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhaladh|thudhaladh]] || [[word:judhaladh|judhaladh]] || [[word:shudhaladh|shudhaladh]] || [[word:kudhaladh|kudhaladh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhaladh|thedhaladh]] || [[word:jedhaladh|jedhaladh]] || [[word:shedhaladh|shedhaladh]] || [[word:kedhaladh|kedhaladh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhaladh|thothodhaladh]] || [[word:jojodhaladh|jojodhaladh]] || [[word:shoshodhaladh|shoshodhaladh]] || [[word:kokodhaladh|kokodhaladh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhaladh|thodhaladh]] || [[word:jodhaladh|jodhaladh]] || [[word:shodhaladh|shodhaladh]] || [[word:kodhaladh|kodhaladh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhaladh|thodhaladh]] || [[word:jodhaladh|jodhaladh]] || [[word:shodhaladh|shodhaladh]] || [[word:kodhaladh|kodhaladh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhaladh|thĂŠdhaladh]] || [[word:jĂŠdhaladh|jĂŠdhaladh]] || [[word:shĂŠdhaladh|shĂŠdhaladh]] || [[word:kĂŠdhaladh|kĂŠdhaladh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhaladh|thathadhaladh]] || [[word:jajadhaladh|jajadhaladh]] || [[word:shashadhaladh|shashadhaladh]] || [[word:kakadhaladh|kakadhaladh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhaladh|thadhaladh]] || [[word:jadhaladh|jadhaladh]] || [[word:shadhaladh|shadhaladh]] || [[word:kadhaladh|kadhaladh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhaladh|thadhaladh]] || [[word:jadhaladh|jadhaladh]] || [[word:shadhaladh|shadhaladh]] || [[word:kadhaladh|kadhaladh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhaladh|shadhaladh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhaladh|goshadhaladh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhaladh|gokishadhaladh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhaladhnĂŒ|shadhaladhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnknĂŒ|goshadhaladhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhnĂŒ|gokishadhaladhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhaladhshĂ«|shadhaladhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkshĂ«|goshadhaladhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhshĂ«|gokishadhaladhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhaladhro|shadhaladhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkro|goshadhaladhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhro|gokishadhaladhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhaladhmu|shadhaladhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkmu|goshadhaladhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhmu|gokishadhaladhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhaladhsher|shadhaladhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnksher|goshadhaladhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhsher|gokishadhaladhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhaladhng|shadhaladhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkng|goshadhaladhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhng|gokishadhaladhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhaladhya|shadhaladhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkya|goshadhaladhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhya|gokishadhaladhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhaladhyam|shadhaladhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkyam|goshadhaladhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhyam|gokishadhaladhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhaladhnĂŒshĂ«|shadhaladhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhaladhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhaladhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhaladhnĂŒro|shadhaladhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnknĂŒro|goshadhaladhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhnĂŒro|gokishadhaladhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhaladhnĂŒmu|shadhaladhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnknĂŒmu|goshadhaladhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhnĂŒmu|gokishadhaladhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhaladhshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhaladhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhaladhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhaladhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhaladhshĂ«ro|shadhaladhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkshĂ«ro|goshadhaladhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhshĂ«ro|gokishadhaladhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhaladhshĂ«mu|shadhaladhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkshĂ«mu|goshadhaladhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhshĂ«mu|gokishadhaladhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhaladhronĂŒ|shadhaladhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkronĂŒ|goshadhaladhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhronĂŒ|gokishadhaladhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhaladhroshĂ«|shadhaladhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkroshĂ«|goshadhaladhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhroshĂ«|gokishadhaladhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhaladhromu|shadhaladhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkromu|goshadhaladhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhromu|gokishadhaladhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhaladhmunĂŒ|shadhaladhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkmunĂŒ|goshadhaladhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhmunĂŒ|gokishadhaladhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhaladhmushĂ«|shadhaladhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkmushĂ«|goshadhaladhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhmushĂ«|gokishadhaladhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhaladhmuro|shadhaladhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhaladhnkmuro|goshadhaladhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhaladhmuro|gokishadhaladhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
